log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Siren — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Siren — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Siren — Unarmored Caster.
→ Siren — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 20] SUCCESS. 17 necrotic damage (half).
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Siren — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Siren — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:12+9=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.

ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Siren — Unarmored Caster.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:14+12=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 20 fire damage. Siren — Unarmored Caster HP: 30/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
